name: pdf_translator
description: Chrome extension to auto translate PDF content (default en -> zh-CN).

scripts.sync:pdfjs: powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path extension/lib,extension/lib/cmaps,extension/lib/standard_fonts | Out-Null; Copy-Item node_modules/pdfjs-dist/build/pdf.mjs extension/lib/pdf.mjs -Force; Copy-Item node_modules/pdfjs-dist/build/pdf.worker.min.mjs extension/lib/pdf.worker.min.mjs -Force; Copy-Item node_modules/pdfjs-dist/cmaps/* extension/lib/cmaps -Recurse -Force; Copy-Item node_modules/pdfjs-dist/standard_fonts/* extension/lib/standard_fonts -Recurse -Force"
